narrative:
Benton Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 972 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
